title: Happy Holladays to All
excerpt: The holladays are here! It’s our last full week in the studio and we’re working away on some super cool projects. Even Buster wants in on the fun. I am still enjoying how beautiful the Dreambox looks even though the…
body: The holladays are here! It’s our last full week in the studio and we’re working away on some super cool projects. Even Buster wants in on the fun. I am still enjoying how beautiful the Dreambox looks even though the rest of the work desks and tables aren’t quite as picturesque. It’s great that one thing in the studio always looks amazing and super organized when the rest is caught up in seasonal chaos. Even then, it’s still a bit of a work in progress… I’m still not sure what to put in the jars on the left door. Any suggestions?
